svg.title: AssessLite workflow
svg.desc: The scientific structure is declared; invariance claims are named in a ledger; transformation attacks probe each claim; verdicts are three-way — stable, unstable, or not resolvable at this n — and the analyst decides: proceed, conditional, or abstain, with an exported audit record.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Test what your analysis depends on

svg.text: Records which invariances were asserted, attacked and what survived — claim↔evidence support, never truth.
